title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a new Anthropic feature that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tool enables users to create fully functional UI layouts, components, and downloadable code through a guided interface with options for prototypes, slide decks, templates, and custom designs.
